poor living. The native will feed many people. He will enjoy Raja Yoga
from 28 to 55, when he will have conveyances. He will establish a
religious institution and will live upto 76-78. His life will be happy.

BHRIGU NANDI NADI
CHART 4I
The native will have a broken
education as there is Mars in the 12th
. house to Mercury. The house next to
Mercury is occupied by Jupiter and
Ven. Dh.
. Ketu. Hence, the native will be
Jupt. intelligent and will have regard for
Dt. elders*Including him five brothers and
sisters constitute the progeny to his
Sun Sat.
Moon parents. The Sun in Sagittarius with
Mer. Mars
Mercury indicate Godly father with
great learning. The father will have
won name and fame through Government. Both the parents have fed poor
people and done other charitable deeds. Venus in the 2nd house to Ketu and
Jupiter' indicates wealth got through his wife-The conjunction of Mars with
